meaning: 比得哥煦[波兰中北部城市]
examples: Off to Bydgoszcz. At night, tenting a blanket over his head to hide his flash light beam from the Valley Forge duty officer, Salinger (by now called Jerry) had written his first short stories.
In the programme on TVN24 channel, an undercover journalist is shown touring the plant, near the city of Bydgoszcz, and speaking with workers under the guise of applying for a job.
His final event was the Polish GP in Bydgoszcz last weekend where Adams produced his best performance of the season with a second placed finish to former World Champion Nicki Pedersen.
